# RateLoop tokenless

RateLoop runs paid sealed human panels for binary and A/B questions.

- Human UI: `/ask`, `/rate`, `/settings`
- Documentation: `/docs`, `/docs/how-it-works`, `/docs/ai`, `/docs/sdk`, `/docs/smart-contracts`
- Agent API: `/api/agent/v1/quote`, `/api/agent/v1/asks`, `/api/agent/v1/asks/{operationKey}/wait`, `/api/agent/v1/results/{operationKey}`
- Schema: `rateloop.tokenless.v1`

Do not describe the tokenless target as using LREP, staking, governance, frontend bonds, challenge oracles, leaderboards, or manual reward claims. Sandbox results are simulations only.
